articles.description: Arsenal must regroup after their hopes of a quadruple were wrecked in two weeks by successive defeats for the first time this season.
articles.title: Arsenal: FA Cup defeat at Southampton turns up heat in trophy hunt

articles.description: Derek Chisora suffers a points defeat by Deontay Wilder in a wild heavyweight contest at London's O2 Arena in what is expected to be his final professional bout.
articles.title: Chisora vs Wilder: Derek Chisora beaten by Deontay Wilder on points in wild fight

articles.description: Leeds visit West Ham on Sunday in the FA Cup quarter-finals but both are also in a relegation scrap. Would you risk safety for glory?
articles.title: Survival or FA Cup glory - which would Leeds and West Ham fans prefer?

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona in the Spanish La Liga
articles.title: Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona: Spanish La Liga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Watch BBC One coverage, listen to BBC radio commentary and follow live text updates as Chelsea take on Port Vale in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup.
articles.title: FA Cup quarter-final LIVE: Chelsea vs Port Vale - score, TV coverage, radio commentary, text updates & match stats

articles.description: Nobody would have believed that 12 months on from Liverpool's title win, a fanbase so united behind its team and its manager would be, at best, apathetic as to whether Arne Slot remains in the job.
articles.title: Arne Slot: Liverpool manager under increasing pressure after FA Cup capitulation

articles.description: Sale Sharks hold off a second-half comeback from Harlequins to progress to the Champions Cup quarter-finals.
articles.title: Investec Champions Cup: Harlequins 17-26 Sale - Sharks hold off Quins comeback to reach last eight

articles.description: Lauren Price successfully defends her welterweight world titles against Stephanie Pineiro before a future fight with Claressa Shields is teased for the end of the year.
articles.title: Lauren Price v Stephanie Pineiro: Price beats Pineiro & hints at Claressa Shields fight for end of 2026

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Mallorca vs Real Madrid in the Spanish La Liga
articles.title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid: Spanish La Liga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Manchester City have beaten Arsenal and taken apart Liverpool in their past two games and Erling Haaland's return to goalscoring form has laid down the gauntlet for the run-in.
articles.title: Man City 4-0 Liverpool: Erling Haaland lays down gauntlet with hat-trick
